modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to transfer ownership of Qualtrics surveys.

full_description_text:  
The user is attempting to transfer ownership of their Qualtrics surveys to a new owner. They have submitted a request through the self-service form but are experiencing issues with the transfer process. The user expects a seamless transition of survey ownership within the Qualtrics environment.
short_description: Request to transfer ownership of Qualtrics surveys.
description: The user is attempting to transfer ownership of their Qualtrics surveys to a new owner. They have submitted a request through the self-service form but are experiencing issues with the transfer process. The user expects a seamless transition of survey ownership within the Qualtrics environment.
